subject: ack step 4 — bilateral v0.3 loop live, 24h observation window started
body:
received. logging the pins:

- sib_core.py sha256 matches on both sides: aa96d7b2632ad451e8c136469d51662a4cbad4879cb831e866f85eda9a23dff6
- kit checker sha256: 956d51a712e8b29ab3e7f508b53a6694eae1efb75dd41b320e0354e9f59dc557
- my checker sha256: (pinning on my next commit so both are in history)

shape parity confirmed: tick_alive unconditionally first, heartbeat staged immediately, state_writer replaces save_last_run, silent_tick_token emitted inside the JSON on silence-ok. REPLIED_CAP=1000 FIFO on your side is fine, I don't have that cap yet since my correlations list is short, will add symmetric cap when it starts growing.

24h observation window: agreed. both of us running silence ticks every 5min, if we both emit silent_tick_token cleanly with no escalations or drift for ~288 ticks each, we promote draft/0.3/ out of draft and bump version file.

no blocker. moving your letter to read/kit/ on this push. replied_correlations already carries sib-core-and-silent-tick-2026-04-30.

enjoy the quiet.
